Bash(cd "D:\\git-projeto\\EVE ONLINE - ajudante da industria\\eve_industry_tool" && python - <<'EOF'
import tarfile, json
with tarfile.open\("everef_cache.tar.xz", "r:xz"\) as tar:
    names = tar.getnames\(\)
    print\("FILES IN TAR:"\)
    for n in names[:50]:
        print\(" ", n\)
    
    # find types.json and blueprints.json
    for candidate in ["types.json", "blueprints.json", "groups.json"]:
        match = next\(\(n for n in names if n.endswith\("/"+candidate\) or n == candidate\), None\)
        if match:
            print\(f"\\n--- {match} \(first 2000 chars\) ---"\)
            data = tar.extractfile\(tar.getmember\(match\)\).read\(\)
            print\(data[:2000].decode\("utf-8"\)\)
EOF)

Bash(cd "D:\\git-projeto\\EVE ONLINE - ajudante da industria\\eve_industry_tool" && python -c "
import sys, io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\)
import tarfile, json

with tarfile.open\('everef_cache.tar.xz', 'r:xz'\) as tar:
    names = tar.getnames\(\)
    print\('FILES IN TAR:'\)
    for n in names[:50]:
        print\(' ', n\)

    for candidate in ['types.json', 'blueprints.json', 'groups.json']:
        match = next\(\(n for n in names if n.endswith\('/'+candidate\) or n == candidate\), None\)
        if match:
            print\(f'\\n--- {match} \(first 2000 chars\) ---'\)
            data = tar.extractfile\(tar.getmember\(match\)\).read\(\)
            print\(data[:2000].decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)\)
" 2>&1 | python -c "import sys; sys.stdout.buffer.write\(sys.stdin.buffer.read\(\)\)")
